scripts.build: pnpm --filter @boilerplate/contracts build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter api lint && pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter api lint:fix && pnpm --filter web lint:fix
scripts.release:check: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm --filter api test
scripts.db:clean: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm --no-deps api node scripts/database/clean-database.js
scripts.db:fresh: pnpm db:clean && pnpm migrate:core && pnpm migrate:tenants && pnpm seed:super-admin
scripts.migrate:core: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm --no-deps api node scripts/database/migrate-core.js
scripts.migrate:tenants: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm --no-deps api node scripts/database/migrate-tenants.js
scripts.migrate:module: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm --no-deps api node scripts/database/migrate-module.js
scripts.tenant:create: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm --no-deps api node scripts/database/create-tenant.js
scripts.seed:super-admin: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file .env run --rm --no-deps api node scripts/database/seed-super-admin.js
